summary: Frontend testing of 2 features completed successfully. Both features working as expected: Rate calculation in Create Funded Deal form auto-calculates correctly, and Conversation chain selector on Client Profile filters messages by phone number.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Both requested features are working correctly. Rate calculation in Create Funded Deal form (FundedDeals.js) auto-calculates Total Payback and Payment Amount based on funded amount, rate %, and term. Conversation chain selector on Client Profile (ClientProfile.js) shows dropdown to filter messages by phone number when multiple chains exist.

rate_calculation_create_funded_deal.description: Rate calculation in Create Funded Deal form auto-calculates Total Payback and Payment Amount
evidence: Auto-calculated badge displayed next to Payment Amount field
Rate helper text shows 'e.g., 50% = 1.5 factor (payback is 150% of funded)'

conversation_chain_selector.description: Client Profile page has dropdown to filter conversation messages by phone number chain
evidence: Chain selector dropdown (data-testid='chain-selector') present in Conversation History section
Dropdown shows 'All Conversations' option plus individual phone number chains with message counts
Selecting a specific chain filters messages to only that chain (6 messages -> 2 messages)
Phone number labels displayed on messages when viewing 'All Conversations' (e.g., '+19172491040', '+19171275394')

technical_notes.rate_calculation_handlers: FundedDeals.js lines 98-160 contain handleFundedAmountChange, handleRateChange, handleNumPaymentsChange, handlePaybackChange functions
technical_notes.conversation_chain_api: ClientProfile.js uses contactsApi.getChains(clientId) to fetch available chains and contactsApi.getConversation(clientId, filterNumber) to fetch filtered messages
technical_notes.chain_state_management: activeChain state variable controls which chain is selected, 'all' shows all messages with phone labels
